allTasks.name: Validate UC Metric Views
allTasks.description:
Validate the generated UC Metric View YAML definitions against the original DAX expressions.

You receive the UCMV Generator output containing YAML definitions for all metric views, and the measures_json containing original DAX expressions with table allocations.

Call the Metric View Validator tool with:
- yaml_content: the YAML dict from the previous crew's output (JSON dict of table_key → YAML string)
- measures_json: the measures JSON used by the UCMV Generator

Return the full validation report with per-table and per-measure quality status.

listeners.name: UC Metric View Generator — JSON Mode (SC Reporting)
listeners.crewName: UC Metric View Generator — JSON Mode (SC Reporting)

tasks.name: Generate UC Metric Views
tasks.description:
Generate UC Metric View YAML definitions and deploy SQL for all fact tables.

You have the following data available in execution inputs:
- measures_json: DAX measures with table allocations (from Measure Conversion Pipeline)
- mquery_json: MQuery table transpilations (from MQuery Conversion Pipeline)
- relationships_json: PBI relationships for join detection (from Relationships Tool)
- scan_data_json: PBI scan data for inline SQL enrichment
- config_json: Customer-specific pipeline config (join maps, filter sets, SWITCH decompositions)

Call the UC Metric View Generator tool with ALL of these inputs.
Set catalog='david_test_metrics' and schema_name='test_schema'.
Set unflatten_tables=true.

Return the full output including number of metric views generated and per-table statistics.

actions.crewName: UC Metric View Generator — JSON Mode (SC Reporting)

startingPoints.taskName: Generate Pipeline Config from PBI APIs

allTasks.name: Generate Pipeline Config from PBI APIs
allTasks.description: Call the Pipeline Config Generator tool with NO arguments — credentials and PBI IDs are pre-configured in tool_configs. The tool calls 4 PBI APIs directly and returns a JSON with all 26 pipeline_config keys. Return the full output without modification.
